HGSS.098.0000:
Battle Tower... It’s so tall!
I wonder how many times my height it is?
HGSS.098.0001:
All the places in the Battle Frontier
let you team up with a friend!\r
That’s so cool, don’t you think?\r
I wish I had a friend to team up with...
HGSS.098.0002:
I am the super Idol in Johto!\f
I’ve come all the way to the
Battle Frontier to promote my\r
latest song!\f
But...\f
Everybody seems to be a
Poké Maniac here!
HGSS.098.0003:
Fishing won’t keep me calm since I came
to know about the Battle Frontier.\r
When I go fishing, I find myself quitting\r
early and coming here.
HGSS.098.0004:
The place I like best among the five
facilities here would be the\r
Battle Castle, because you can see\r
Lady Caitlin there!
HGSS.098.0005:
What makes me the most happy being
a Trainer?\f
The fact that Pokémon will always bring
me lots of friends!
HGSS.098.0006:
Just like people go through different
things they can learn from, Pokémon\r
learn different things from battles.\f
Behind every experience, there is a
story. Isn’t that right, dear?
HGSS.098.0007:
All experiences lead to a tale.
I’m not wrong, am I, dear?
HGSS.098.0008:
I’ve come to the Battle Frontier to
get a job!\f
Thanks to my previous job, I’m good
at cooking, cleaning, and laundry!
HGSS.098.0009:
To be strong is to be weak.
To be weak is to be strong.\f
Somebody told me that before.
I don’t quite understand it yet,\r
but it sounds deep.\f
I’ll just give myself some time
to figure it out.
HGSS.098.0010:
Watching these people who care so much
about Pokémon makes me feel ashamed\r
of my selfishness.\f
I’ll try and face my Pokémon for real!
HGSS.098.0011:
I wonder how many years it’s been since
I first met a Pokémon? ...Forty-nine!\f
Oh, I lost the page that kept track of
how many years, days, and hours...\f
Could it be my Pokémon nibbling on it?
HGSS.098.0012:
Trainers care about Pokémon
as the battle progresses.\f
In return, Pokémon repay that trust
by using moves the best they can.\f
What you see in a battle is the trust
between people and Pokémon.\f
This may seem obvious, but it’s actually
incredibly amazing!
HGSS.098.0013:
You cannot try anything if you are
afraid of losing battles.\f
But!\f
Getting into a battle knowing you have
no chance of winning will only make your\r
Pokémon suffer.\f
That’s not courage!
Truly good Trainers know the balance\r
between courage and cautiousness.
HGSS.098.0014:
If you want to graduate from being
a so-so Trainer, mark my words!\f
The Pokémon’s type!\f
The moves to be learned!\f
The items to be held!\f
You can’t overlook a single detail.
HGSS.098.0015:
When people win a battle, some laugh
at their opponent.\f
Some brag about his or her strengths.\f
Some even start to dance around 
claiming he or she is number one\r
in the world.\f
I respect people who win and then
care about their opponent.
HGSS.098.0016:
Have you heard of the Brains of the
Battle Frontier?\f
There are five facilities in the
Battle Frontier.\f
At every one, you can win your way
through to challenge the bosses\r
called the Frontier Brains.\r
They’re out-of-this-world tough!
HGSS.098.0017:
Allowing us to enjoy battles,
helping us work,\r
taking us to places far away,\r
or just being good friends...\f
Pokémon are so deep.
I wanna be like Pokémon.
HGSS.098.0018:
At the Battle Factory, you have to
keep winning with rental Pokémon.\f
I may not stand a chance at other
facilities, but I may go all the\r
way here!
HGSS.098.0019:
The Battle Hall is where Pokémon battle
one-on-one for as long as they can.\f
Even my MAGIKARP has a shot at
number one!\f
Wow!\f
Just the thought of it makes
me excited!
HGSS.098.0020:
Life is full of ebbs and flows.
I’ll keep my inflatable tube close.\f
I could call it the wisdom I gained
in the last five years of my life.
HGSS.098.0021:
Welcome to the Exchange Service
Corner!\f
Would you like to trade in your BP
for some prizes? [0200,0000]
HGSS.098.0022: Please come back any time you want!
HGSS.098.0026:
You put away the [0108,0000,0000]
in the [0112,0001,0000] Pocket.\f
HGSS.098.0027:
I’m sorry, but you don’t have
enough BP.\f
HGSS.098.0029: I’m sorry, but your Bag is full.\f
HGSS.098.0030:
Please choose the TM you
would like. [0200,0000]
HGSS.098.0031:
Please choose the item you
would like. [0200,0000]
HGSS.098.0034:
Battle Tower
Never Lose! Keep Winning!
HGSS.098.0035:
Battle Hall
Let Each Pokémon Seek No. 1
HGSS.098.0036:
Battle Castle
Manage Battles with Castle Points
HGSS.098.0037:
Battle Arcade
Where Events Sway Outcomes
HGSS.098.0038:
Battle Factory
Win Consecutively with Rental Pokémon
HGSS.098.0039:
A Trainer who just caught a Pokémon.
That’s what this statue represents.
HGSS.098.0040:
“Boastful of Capture”...
That seems to be the title.
HGSS.098.0041:
This...!
A scale model of the Battle Frontier.
